title: Wither Cannon
description: Turns the Wither boss into a hilarious "Wither Cannon"! Every time it shoots a skull, you’ll hear the iconic Cob Cannon sound from Plants vs. Zombies. A fun crossover sound pack for Minecraft!
body:
# 💥 Wither Cannon

Ever wondered what would happen if Minecraft’s most feared boss, the Wither, turned into a **Cob Cannon from Plants vs. Zombies?** Well... now you don’t have to imagine anymore!

**Wither Cannon** replaces the Wither’s skull-shooting sound with the iconic **“boom”** of the Cob Cannon, creating a perfect mix of chaos and comedy! Every time the Wither fires, you’ll hear that satisfying PvZ cannon blast echo through the battlefield.

---

## 🎮 Features
* **Iconic Sound FX:** Replaces the default Wither shooting sound with the high-quality Cob Cannon fire sound.
* **Version Support:** Works perfectly in Minecraft **1.21.x**.
* **Pure Chaos:** Transform a stressful boss fight into a nostalgic and funny experience.
* **Lightweight:** Only changes the specific sound file, keeping it compatible with almost any other pack.

---

## 📺 Media
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/YKU8a4IXghg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

---

## 🛠️ Installation
1. Download the **.zip** file.
2. Place it in your `resourcepacks` folder.
3. In Minecraft, go to **Options** > **Resource Packs** and enable **Wither Cannon**.
4. Summon your Wither... and enjoy the chaos! 🌽💀

---

## ⚖️ Disclaimer
* This is just a fun crossover fan-made project.
* All sounds belong to their respective owners — **Plants vs. Zombies © PopCap**.

---
